---
title: "Climate Guest Speakers"
css: /custom.css
image: files/headshots/you.png
page-layout: full
toc: false

listing:
 - id: featured-speaker
   contents: /speakers/maryam-mozafari/
   type: default
   max-items: 1
   page-size: 0 #set as 0 will remove the page setting
   sort: 
     - "date asc"
     - "title asc"

 - id: recent-speakers
   contents:
    - /speakers/fabio-passaro/
    - /speakers/liqun-peng/
    - /speakers/samuel-vaillancourt/
#   exclude: 
#   author: "Guest Speaker"
#   title: "Ketch Morse*"
   type: grid
   max-items: 3
   image-height: 300px
   page-size: 0 #set as 0 will remove the page setting
   sort: 
     - "date asc"
     - "title asc"
---

<!--Please delete or replace with your own clarity-->
{{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}}

## Featured speaker

:::{#featured-speaker}
:::

## Upcoming speakers

:::{#recent-speakers}
:::
